mapper.select: SELECT l.line_id AS lineId, l.total_data AS amount, p.qos_speed_limit AS qosSpeedLimit, l.last_balance_refreshed_at AS lastBalanceRefreshedAt FROM LINE l JOIN PLAN p ON p.plan_id = l.plan_id WHERE l.line_id = #{lineId} AND l.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE LINE l JOIN PLAN p ON p.plan_id = l.plan_id SET l.total_data = p.basic_data_amount, l.last_balance_refreshed_at = #{targetMonthStart}, l.updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE l.line_id = #{lineId} AND l.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND l.last_balance_refreshed_at < #{targetMonthStart}
mapper.select: SELECT family_id AS familyId, pool_total_data AS amount, last_balance_refreshed_at AS lastBalanceRefreshedAt FROM FAMILY WHERE family_id = #{familyId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE FAMILY f SET f.pool_total_data = ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.shared_pool_amount), 0) FROM LINE l JOIN PLAN p ON p.plan_id = l.plan_id WHERE l.family_id = #{familyId} AND l.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ), f.last_balance_refreshed_at = #{targetMonthStart}, f.updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE f.family_id = #{familyId} AND f.deleted_at IS NULL AND f.last_balance_refreshed_at < #{targetMonthStart}
